title: Custom Default Item Owner for Form Submissions

posts.author: ashleyy (Ashley Diaz)
posts.cookedHtml: I propose adding the ability to customize the default item owner for form submissions in Monday.com. Currently, the item owner is automatically set to the form creator or automation setup, but it would be valuable to designate a different user or team as the default owner. This feature would enhance collaboration and streamline workflows, especially when form fillers are external applicants without Monday.com accounts. Please consider implementing this feature to improve ownership assignment in form-based processes. Thank you for your consideration.
